TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Pasaycu, title = Pasaycu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pasaycu} }

S.FORM: Ś∑īŤ≥ĹśóŹ(Ś∑īŤ≥ĹŤ™ě:Basay,Basai,Kawanuwan), (Luilang) . Psaycu "Pasaycu a kamu, Basay, Basai, Kawanuwan"singangan aca tu Masaycu, Masaycu, Taywan Pinpucu a Yincumicu, maliwaliwah i Sin-pey Tan-suy, Taypak, Ci-lung, Sain-pey Kung-lyaw, Sin-pey-Cin-san Ci-lung atu Sain-pey Kung-lyaw Ku angangan. saca atu Lan-yang enalay a Kabalancu namasungaay, ayza zayhan Pasaycu mapala u Kaytakelacu mapaLayak aca caaytu kadayu mahapinang, Pasacu atu Lyelangcu "Luilang" tungusay u Kaytakelancu. kakiliman misiwkayÁį°šĽč Pasacu a tuas saayaway hakay u baluhay ba'tuaay a ziday tu sazikuzay, makay Tungnaya tayni i Taywan nuwalian, saamkisan lilis nu bayu u kim, galas a tuud mikawaw tu malali'acaay a binacadan, kilulsa malali'acaay macacabesiw mahiza sa maketun, i Taywan satu ku heni, nika atu zumaay lilisay nu bayu a binacadan caay ka lecad, caay pala nu tizaay Taywan a Yincumincu, uyzasa amgamgam malalid mapapacakay ku nikauzip, "ś≤ôťā£Ť≥Ĺ"(Sanasai) (Santiago/Ki-vanow-an)ÁôĽťôł. ) sakukamu mahapinzang ku kaliwaliwah nu ziyazu' nu heni, "malali'acaay atu malaliyun tu maliwasak a binacadan micidek, asaca u Sa-na-say nakamuan u kamu nu binacadan lalingatuan u "nipatiyak Pasaycu a tuas nakay nuyaanay a kakitizaan a "Sa-na-say" "Sanasai" mumul zikuz, katukuh i Taywan subal satimulan a Cya-cyaw-san-paw-cyaw 'Santiago/ki-vanow-an" a tatukus." nilaculan 1694 (Trobiawan), (Linaw). 1694 a mihcaan ayaw nu Kang-si tabakiay a ninel Pasacu i saamisan nu Taypak angangan u kasacacayat nu Yincumincu. uyni a binacadan kaliwaliwah liwliw u Tan-suy, Ci-lung-sa'wac, Sin-tyen sa'wac saamisa a kakitizaan, malaliwaliwah azyzaay a Taypak, Ci-lung-se, Sin-pey-seay a Luiy-bang, Kung-lyaw, Sin-tyen a kakiyizaan. cunus ayaw nu 16 lasubu a mihcaan mabulaw katukuh i I-lan-se-tow. Tow-low-mey-yen "Trobiawan", atu kasuala tu I-lan-naw-se "Linaw'. , Pasaycu nu Taywan cayay kakatuud nu malali'acaay angangan mahiniay ku nikauzip nu binacadan, uheni cacay a mihcaan mikawaw caay ka pina a bulad adidi'ay ku nilalukan, silawad hatu misanga' tu nalimaan mahiniay aikecan, dawaw a tuud atu zuma a binacadan malaliyun tu kakanan, nu ayzaay Pasaycu malumanay luma' nazipaanay maazih ku nu ayzaay ziday a kapuwa hatu makayza malali'acaay tu Kabalanay, uzuma uheni mikawaw tu tizaay a Yincumin atu tayniay nu patiyamay, mikuwanay nu misiwkayay, .Ť®ėŤľČšł≠Quimaurri ,Taparri QuimaurrišļļťÉĹśėĮTaparrišļļ,šĽĖŚÄĎšļíÁõłÁę∂Áą≠, malali'acaay nu heni ahebal mahamin ku nuwasisan, sawalian saamisan lilis nu bayu anucaay tukus nu sa'wac, i 17 lasubu a mihcaan Sipangya a nisulitan niciluanay, Pasay kamu tuwaca mikilul tu henian a malali'acaay malala u saamisan Taywan masazumaay a binacadan malecaday ku kamu. nisulitan tu Quimaurri "Cin-paw-li-se", Taparri" Tan-suy-se" kanahatu masazuma ku eneng, nika hamin nu Quimaurri hatu Taparri a tademawan macacabi' ku heni, nika masasulaacawa ku heni aca, malecad ku lisin, caay kahiza nu zumaay a Yincumin mahiza maluk, nu uzipay a niyazu' icapi alihican miadup tu ngabul malali'acay tu bukul nu ngabul. uheni nu nalimaan atu zumaay a Yincumin malaliyun tu melac,milikab tu zuma nu malukay a Yincamin, Helan nisulitan hinisa Masaycu caay kaluk, taneng mizateng zuma mikalukay a Yincumicu hakay atu Masay masazumaay a binacadan. zayhan makay 16 lasubu a mihcaan miteka ku misiwbayay nu Layak micumud tu saamisan nu Taywan yadah kuni pacumud tu kapuwa, adidi'ay a nalimaan a tuud, sisa Pasay cacaay pisuped tu kayadahay a zaysang, palalecad tu zumaay a binacadan caay kakapah kunikauzip, kilul Pasaycu haymaw sa mala u Bu-cyen nu bisiwbayay atu Taywan a Yicncumincu mapapacakay tu misiwkay, 17 lasubu a mihcaan-18 lasubu a mihcaan, Bu-cyen-cyen-cow-bu atu Cang-cow-buay a Layak malimad sabeleng micumud i Taywan, Pinpucu kasa binacadan sayhan masaenal ku kakitizaan, atu mitiyung tu Layak ku yadahay. lais atu malalaisśąįŤąáśąįŚĹĻ Cilung a lais "sakatusa Sen-say-al-wa-tu-cen a kalalais" kalalaisan, izaw 1000 ku tademaw i Tan-suy Pasaycu matinengay miacin katukuh i Cinlung a subal "Pasay a kamu, Tuman" nuayawan tukus, mikutay tu Helan a hitay midap, nika Helan a hitay mikeliday milais ci Ha-lu-s hinisa u acing sakay lalais caay katabaki ku pipadang, tudawa paitizaentu tizaay a kitizaan. migingkiw tu nazipaanťĀļŤ∑°Á†ĒÁ©∂ tini i nuamisan Taywan a Ci-sin-san, micapi tu tukun capi izaw ku misengiay tu cin-ce-ta malecad u adidi'ay a buyu', atu cipiay malaklakay zuma nu mahicahicaay a ba'tu, bey-tye migingkiway ci He-sin-lung hinisa Taywan satabakiay ba'tu lalangawan a nazipaan, hakay nu Pasacu a salisinan. 2004 a mihcaan Ney-cen-pu ing-cyensu Yangmin-san kanatal aidangan kuwanay patudud tu Cong-howa-min-kow kanatal aidangan matineng palekal tu " Ci-sin-tyen-pin atu Kaytakela migingkiw macakatay" saayaway a kalaheci hinisa uyni a "nazipaan" cayay ku nu kasumamadad tademaw a nisubelidan a wayway, kasuala migingkiway tu nazipaan mikutkut caay kaazih ku nisubelidan nu kasumamadan a tademaw, nunamahini cacaay ka pawacay ku tiniay a kakitizaan atu makayniay tu "Kaytakela". malaliti tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: ***(***:basaj,basai,kawanuwan), (r~…ĺuir~…ĺaŇč) . psaj ¶u "pasaj ¶u a kamu, basaj, basai, kawanuwan"siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu masaj ¶u, masaj ¶u, tajwan pinpu ¶u a jin ¶umi ¶u, mar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i sin-p…ô tan-suj, tajpak, ¶i-r~…ĺuŇč, sain-p…ô kuŇč-r~…ĺjaw, sin-p…ô- ¶in-san ¶i-r~…ĺuŇč atu sain-p…ô kuŇč-r~…ĺjaw ku aŇčaŇčan. sa ¶a atu r~…ĺan-jaŇč …ônar~…ĺaj a kabar~…ĺan ¶u namasuŇčaaj, ajza zajńßan pasaj ¶u mapar~…ĺa u kajtak…ôr~…ĺa ¶u mapar~…ĺajak a ¶a ¶aajtu kadaju mańßapinaŇč, pasa ¶u atu r~…ĺj…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶u "r~…ĺuir~…ĺaŇč" tuŇčusaj u kajtak…ôr~…ĺan ¶u. kakir~…ĺiman misiwkaj** pasa ¶u a tuas saajawaj ńßakaj u bar~…ĺuńßaj ba Ē~ °tuaaj a zidaj tu sazikuzaj, makaj tuŇčnaja tajni i tajwan nuwar~…ĺian, saamkisan r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu baju u kim, gar~…ĺas a tuud mikawaw tu mar~…ĺar~…ĺi Ē~ °a ¶aaj a bina ¶adan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺsa mar~…ĺar~…ĺi Ē~ °a ¶aaj ma ¶a ¶ab…ôsiw mańßiza sa mak…ôtun, i tajwan satu ku ńß…ôni, nika atu zumaaj r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj nu baju a bina ¶adan ¶aaj ka r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ¶aaj par~…ĺa nu tizaaj tajwan a jin ¶umin ¶u, ujzasa amgamgam mar~…ĺar~…ĺid mapapa ¶akaj ku nikauzip, "***"(sanasai) (santiago/ki-*anow-an)**. ) sakukamu mańßapinzaŇč ku kar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß nu zijazu Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni, "mar~…ĺar~…ĺi Ē~ °a ¶aaj atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu mar~…ĺiwasak a bina ¶adan mi ¶id…ôk, asa ¶a u sa-na-saj nakamuan u kamu nu bina ¶adan r~…ĺar~…ĺiŇčatuan u "nipatijak pasaj ¶u a tuas nakaj nujaanaj a kakitizaan a "sa-na-saj" "sanasai" mumur~…ĺ zikuz, katukuńß i tajwan subar~…ĺ satimur~…ĺan a ¶ja- ¶jaw-san-paw- ¶jaw Ē~ °santiago/ki-*anow-an" a tatukus." nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan **** (trobiawan), (r~…ĺinaw). **** a mińß ¶aan ajaw nu kaŇč-si tabakiaj a nin…ôr~…ĺ pasa ¶u i saamisan nu tajpak aŇčaŇčan u kasa ¶a ¶ajat nu jin ¶umin ¶u. ujni a bina ¶adan kar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw u tan-suj, ¶i-r~…ĺuŇč-sa Ē~ °wa ¶, sin-tj…ôn sa Ē~ °wa ¶ saamisa a kakitizaan, mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß azjzaaj a tajpak, ¶i-r~…ĺuŇč-s…ô, sin-p…ô-s…ôaj a r~…ĺuij-baŇč, kuŇč-r~…ĺjaw, sin-tj…ôn a kakijizaan. ¶unus ajaw nu ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan mabur~…ĺaw katukuńß i i-r~…ĺan-s…ô-tow. tow-r~…ĺow-m…ô-j…ôn "trobiawan", atu kasuar~…ĺa tu i-r~…ĺan-naw-s…ô "r~…ĺinaw Ē~ °. , pasaj ¶u nu tajwan ¶ajaj kakatuud nu mar~…ĺar~…ĺi Ē~ °a ¶aaj aŇčaŇčan mańßiniaj ku nikauzip nu bina ¶adan, uńß…ôni ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan mikawaw ¶aaj ka pina a bur~…ĺad adidi Ē~ °aj ku nir~…ĺar~…ĺukan, sir~…ĺawad ńßatu misaŇča Ē~ ° tu nar~…ĺimaan mańßiniaj aik…ô ¶an, dawaw a tuud atu zuma a bina ¶adan mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu kakanan, nu ajzaaj pasaj ¶u mar~…ĺumanaj r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nazipaanaj maazińß ku nu ajzaaj zidaj a kapuwa ńßatu makajza mar~…ĺar~…ĺi Ē~ °a ¶aaj tu kabar~…ĺanaj, uzuma uńß…ôni mikawaw tu tizaaj a jin ¶umin atu tajniaj nu patijamaj, mikuwanaj nu misiwkajaj, .****uimaurri ,taparri *uimaurri***taparri*,******, mar~…ĺar~…ĺi Ē~ °a ¶aaj nu ńß…ôni ańß…ôbar~…ĺ mańßamin ku nuwasisan, sawar~…ĺian saamisan r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu baju anu ¶aaj tukus nu sa Ē~ °wa ¶, i ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan sipaŇčja a nisur~…ĺitan ni ¶ir~…ĺuanaj, pasaj kamu tuwa ¶a mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ńß…ônian a mar~…ĺar~…ĺi Ē~ °a ¶aaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺa u saamisan tajwan masazumaaj a bina ¶adan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku kamu. nisur~…ĺitan tu *uimaurri " ¶in-paw-r~…ĺi-s…ô", taparri" tan-suj-s…ô" kanańßatu masazuma ku …ôn…ôŇč, nika ńßamin nu *uimaurri ńßatu taparri a tad…ômawan ma ¶a ¶abi Ē~ ° ku ńß…ôni, nika masasur~…ĺaa ¶awa ku ńß…ôni a ¶a, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku r~…ĺisin, ¶aaj kańßiza nu zumaaj a jin ¶umin mańßiza mar~…ĺuk, nu uzipaj a nijazu Ē~ ° i ¶api ar~…ĺińßi ¶an miadup tu Ňčabur~…ĺ mar~…ĺar~…ĺi Ē~ °a ¶aj tu bukur~…ĺ nu Ňčabur~…ĺ. uńß…ôni nu nar~…ĺimaan atu zumaaj a jin ¶umin mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu m…ôr~…ĺa ¶,mir~…ĺikab tu zuma nu mar~…ĺukaj a jin ¶amin, ńß…ôr~…ĺan nisur~…ĺitan ńßinisa masaj ¶u ¶aaj kar~…ĺuk, tan…ôŇč mizat…ôŇč zuma mikar~…ĺukaj a jin ¶umi ¶u ńßakaj atu masaj masazumaaj a bina ¶adan. zajńßan makaj ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan mit…ôka ku misiwbajaj nu r~…ĺajak mi ¶umud tu saamisan nu tajwan jadańß kuni pa ¶umud tu kapuwa, adidi Ē~ °aj a nar~…ĺimaan a tuud, sisa pasaj ¶a ¶aaj pisup…ôd tu kajadańßaj a zajsaŇč, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu zumaaj a bina ¶adan ¶aaj kakapańß kunikauzip, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ pasaj ¶u ńßajmaw sa mar~…ĺa u bu- ¶j…ôn nu bisiwbajaj atu tajwan a ji ¶n ¶umin ¶u mapapa ¶akaj tu misiwkaj, ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan-** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan, bu- ¶j…ôn- ¶j…ôn- ¶ow-bu atu ¶aŇč- ¶ow-buaj a r~…ĺajak mar~…ĺimad sab…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč mi ¶umud i tajwan, pinpu ¶u kasa bina ¶adan sajńßan masa…ônar~…ĺ ku kakitizaan, atu mitijuŇč tu r~…ĺajak ku jadańßaj. r~…ĺais atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺais**** ¶ir~…ĺuŇč a r~…ĺais "sakatusa s…ôn-saj-ar~…ĺ-wa-tu- ¶…ôn a kar~…ĺar~…ĺais" kar~…ĺar~…ĺaisan, izaw **** ku tad…ômaw i tan-suj pasaj ¶u matin…ôŇčaj mia ¶in katukuńß i ¶inr~…ĺuŇč a subar~…ĺ "pasaj a kamu, tuman" nuajawan tukus, mikutaj tu ńß…ôr~…ĺan a ńßitaj midap, nika ńß…ôr~…ĺan a ńßitaj mik…ôr~…ĺidaj mir~…ĺais ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺu-s ńßinisa u a ¶iŇč sakaj r~…ĺar~…ĺais ¶aaj katabaki ku pipadaŇč, tudawa paitiza…ôntu tizaaj a kitizaan. migiŇčkiw tu nazipaan**** tini i nuamisan tajwan a ¶i-sin-san, mi ¶api tu tukun ¶api izaw ku mis…ôŇčiaj tu ¶in- ¶…ô-ta mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad u adidi Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ °, atu ¶ipiaj mar~…ĺakr~…ĺakaj zuma nu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a ba Ē~ °tu, b…ô-tj…ô migiŇčkiwaj ¶i ńß…ô-sin-r~…ĺuŇč ńßinisa tajwan satabakiaj ba Ē~ °tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a nazipaan, ńßakaj nu pasa ¶u a sar~…ĺisinan. **** a mińß ¶aan n…ô- ¶…ôn-pu iŇč- ¶j…ônsu jaŇčmin-san kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan kuwanaj patudud tu ¶oŇč-ńßowa-min-kow kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan matin…ôŇč par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu " ¶i-sin-tj…ôn-pin atu kajtak…ôr~…ĺa migiŇčkiw ma ¶akataj" saajawaj a kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ńßinisa ujni a "nazipaan" ¶ajaj ku nu kasumamadad tad…ômaw a nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a wajwaj, kasuar~…ĺa migiŇčkiwaj tu nazipaan mikutkut ¶aaj kaazińß ku nisub…ôr~…ĺidan nu kasumamadan a tad…ômaw, nunamańßini ¶a ¶aaj ka pawa ¶aj ku tiniaj a kakitizaan atu makajniaj tu "kajtak…ôr~…ĺa". mar~…ĺar~…ĺiti tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: Ś∑īŤ≥ĹśóŹ(Ś∑īŤ≥ĹŤ™ě:Basay,Basai,Kawanuwan), (Luilang) . Psaycu "Pasaycu a kamu, Basay, Basai, Kawanuwan"singangan aca tu Masaycu, Masaycu, Taywan Pinpucu a Yincumicu, maliwaliwah i Sin-pey Tan-suy, Taypak, Ci-lung, Sain-pey Kung-lyaw, Sin-pey-Cin-san Ci-lung atu Sain-pey Kung-lyaw Ku angangan. saca atu Lan-yang enalay a Kabalancu namasungaay, ayza zayhan Pasaycu mapala u Kaytakelacu mapaLayak aca caaytu kadayu mahapinang, Pasacu atu Lyelangcu "Luilang" tungusay u Kaytakelancu. kakiliman misiwkayÁį°šĽč Pasacu a tuas saayaway hakay u baluhay ba'tuaay a ziday tu sazikuzay, makay Tungnaya tayni i Taywan nuwalian, saamkisan lilis nu bayu u kim, galas a tuud mikawaw tu malali'acaay a binacadan, kilulsa malali'acaay macacabesiw mahiza sa maketun, i Taywan satu ku heni, nika atu zumaay lilisay nu bayu a binacadan caay ka lecad, caay pala nu tizaay Taywan a Yincumincu, uyzasa amgamgam malalid mapapacakay ku nikauzip, "ś≤ôťā£Ť≥Ĺ"(Sanasai) (Santiago/Ki-vanow-an)ÁôĽťôł. ) sakukamu mahapinzang ku kaliwaliwah nu ziyazu' nu heni, "malali'acaay atu malaliyun tu maliwasak a binacadan micidek, asaca u Sa-na-say nakamuan u kamu nu binacadan lalingatuan u "nipatiyak Pasaycu a tuas nakay nuyaanay a kakitizaan a "Sa-na-say" "Sanasai" mumul zikuz, katukuh i Taywan subal satimulan a Cya-cyaw-san-paw-cyaw 'Santiago/ki-vanow-an" a tatukus." nilaculan 1694 (Trobiawan), (Linaw). 1694 a mihcaan ayaw nu Kang-si tabakiay a ninel Pasacu i saamisan nu Taypak angangan u kasacacayat nu Yincumincu. uyni a binacadan kaliwaliwah liwliw u Tan-suy, Ci-lung-sa'wac, Sin-tyen sa'wac saamisa a kakitizaan, malaliwaliwah azyzaay a Taypak, Ci-lung-se, Sin-pey-seay a Luiy-bang, Kung-lyaw, Sin-tyen a kakiyizaan. cunus ayaw nu 16 lasubu a mihcaan mabulaw katukuh i I-lan-se-tow. Tow-low-mey-yen "Trobiawan", atu kasuala tu I-lan-naw-se "Linaw'. , Pasaycu nu Taywan cayay kakatuud nu malali'acaay angangan mahiniay ku nikauzip nu binacadan, uheni cacay a mihcaan mikawaw caay ka pina a bulad adidi'ay ku nilalukan, silawad hatu misanga' tu nalimaan mahiniay aikecan, dawaw a tuud atu zuma a binacadan malaliyun tu kakanan, nu ayzaay Pasaycu malumanay luma' nazipaanay maazih ku nu ayzaay ziday a kapuwa hatu makayza malali'acaay tu Kabalanay, uzuma uheni mikawaw tu tizaay a Yincumin atu tayniay nu patiyamay, mikuwanay nu misiwkayay, .Ť®ėŤľČšł≠Quimaurri ,Taparri QuimaurrišļļťÉĹśėĮTaparrišļļ,šĽĖŚÄĎšļíÁõłÁę∂Áą≠, malali'acaay nu heni ahebal mahamin ku nuwasisan, sawalian saamisan lilis nu bayu anucaay tukus nu sa'wac, i 17 lasubu a mihcaan Sipangya a nisulitan niciluanay, Pasay kamu tuwaca mikilul tu henian a malali'acaay malala u saamisan Taywan masazumaay a binacadan malecaday ku kamu. nisulitan tu Quimaurri "Cin-paw-li-se", Taparri" Tan-suy-se" kanahatu masazuma ku eneng, nika hamin nu Quimaurri hatu Taparri a tademawan macacabi' ku heni, nika masasulaacawa ku heni aca, malecad ku lisin, caay kahiza nu zumaay a Yincumin mahiza maluk, nu uzipay a niyazu' icapi alihican miadup tu ngabul malali'acay tu bukul nu ngabul. uheni nu nalimaan atu zumaay a Yincumin malaliyun tu melac,milikab tu zuma nu malukay a Yincamin, Helan nisulitan hinisa Masaycu caay kaluk, taneng mizateng zuma mikalukay a Yincumicu hakay atu Masay masazumaay a binacadan. zayhan makay 16 lasubu a mihcaan miteka ku misiwbayay nu Layak micumud tu saamisan nu Taywan yadah kuni pacumud tu kapuwa, adidi'ay a nalimaan a tuud, sisa Pasay cacaay pisuped tu kayadahay a zaysang, palalecad tu zumaay a binacadan caay kakapah kunikauzip, kilul Pasaycu haymaw sa mala u Bu-cyen nu bisiwbayay atu Taywan a Yicncumincu mapapacakay tu misiwkay, 17 lasubu a mihcaan-18 lasubu a mihcaan, Bu-cyen-cyen-cow-bu atu Cang-cow-buay a Layak malimad sabeleng micumud i Taywan, Pinpucu kasa binacadan sayhan masaenal ku kakitizaan, atu mitiyung tu Layak ku yadahay. lais atu malalaisśąįŤąáśąįŚĹĻ Cilung a lais "sakatusa Sen-say-al-wa-tu-cen a kalalais" kalalaisan, izaw 1000 ku tademaw i Tan-suy Pasaycu matinengay miacin katukuh i Cinlung a subal "Pasay a kamu, Tuman" nuayawan tukus, mikutay tu Helan a hitay midap, nika Helan a hitay mikeliday milais ci Ha-lu-s hinisa u acing sakay lalais caay katabaki ku pipadang, tudawa paitizaentu tizaay a kitizaan. migingkiw tu nazipaanťĀļŤ∑°Á†ĒÁ©∂ tini i nuamisan Taywan a Ci-sin-san, micapi tu tukun capi izaw ku misengiay tu cin-ce-ta malecad u adidi'ay a buyu', atu cipiay malaklakay zuma nu mahicahicaay a ba'tu, bey-tye migingkiway ci He-sin-lung hinisa Taywan satabakiay ba'tu lalangawan a nazipaan, hakay nu Pasacu a salisinan. 2004 a mihcaan Ney-cen-pu ing-cyensu Yangmin-san kanatal aidangan kuwanay patudud tu Cong-howa-min-kow kanatal aidangan matineng palekal tu " Ci-sin-tyen-pin atu Kaytakela migingkiw macakatay" saayaway a kalaheci hinisa uyni a "nazipaan" cayay ku nu kasumamadad tademaw a nisubelidan a wayway, kasuala migingkiway tu nazipaan mikutkut caay kaazih ku nisubelidan nu kasumamadan a tademaw, nunamahini cacaay ka pawacay ku tiniay a kakitizaan atu makayniay tu "Kaytakela". malaliti tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: ***(***:basaj,basai,kawanuwan), (r~…ĺuir~…ĺaŇč) . psaj ¶u "pasaj ¶u a kamu, basaj, basai, kawanuwan"siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu masaj ¶u, masaj ¶u, tajwan pinpu ¶u a jin ¶umi ¶u, mar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i
